title: linum angustifolium subsp. humile
intro: Linum angustifolium subsp. humile, commonly known as the dwarf flax or small-flowered flax, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Linaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Linum angustifolium subsp. humile can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
